title: alangium chinense var. taiwanianum
intro: Alangium chinense var. taiwanianum, also known as the Taiwan alangium or Chinese alangium, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cornaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Taiwan, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alangium chinense var. taiwanianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
